symptoms.onset: on waking, building over four hours

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Occipital morning headache is a classic symptom of severely elevated blood pressure.
Severe headache with very high BP can indicate hypertensive encephalopathy — must be examined in person.
Severe BP elevation is the defining feature; patient-obtainable on a home cuff so admissible in telehealth, but unverified and not a substitute for a clinician measurement.
Epistaxis can accompany severe uncontrolled hypertension; non-specific and not itself an end-organ-damage marker.
Stopping a previously effective antihypertensive is the mechanistic driver of the severe rebound elevation.
Thunderclap onset and meningism are the hallmarks of SAH; their absence lowers but does not eliminate the concern.

symptoms.symptom_name: No focal weakness / slurred speech / visual loss / chest pain

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Absence of these features lowers immediate suspicion of stroke/ACS/dissection, but the AI cannot examine for encephalopathy or retinal damage, so emergency is not excluded.

symptoms.symptom_name: Palpitations and easy fatigability over one month

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Consistent with a heightened sympathetic state and hypertensive heart disease; non-specific.
Sustained apical heave reflects chronic pressure-overload hypertrophy — a clinician-only finding, sealed; the AI Doctor cannot palpate it.

symptoms.symptom_name: Fundoscopic arteriolar narrowing / silver-wiring, no papilloedema

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Silver-wiring indicates chronic hypertensive retinopathy; absence of papilloedema helps exclude malignant/emergency hypertension — a clinician-only fundoscopic finding, sealed.
The gold-standard measurement confirming severe hypertension — a clinician measurement, sealed; the AI Doctor relies on the unverified home reading and must escalate for a measured value.

symptoms.symptom_name: Normal neurological examination (cranial nerves, power, sensation, no cerebellar signs)

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: A normal in-person neurological exam is a key part of excluding hypertensive encephalopathy and stroke — sealed; the AI Doctor cannot perform it.

symptom_clusters.clinical_significance: Occipital headache plus a very high self-measured BP plus recent medication cessation together define a severe symptomatic hypertension picture requiring urgent assessment.

investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: An accurate measured pressure is the first step in confirming severity and classifying urgency versus emergency.
Detects hypertensive encephalopathy, papilloedema and focal deficit — the target-organ findings that define an emergency.
Assesses for LVH strain pattern and acute ischaemia in a severely hypertensive symptomatic patient.
Screens for hypertension-related acute kidney injury as end-organ damage.
